title: Repair Costs
query: SELECT ((SELECT COALESCE(SUM(Cost), 0) FROM Repair WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate) + (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(Cost), 0) FROM RepairAll WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate)) AS total

details.text: {total} credits spent on ship repairs during the report period. How much you spend on repairs tells the true cost of your adventures — a high repair bill means you were pushing the limits, taking punishment, and living on the edge rather than maintaining safe distance from danger.
details.help: Repair fires for individual module repairs with Cost per event; RepairAll fires for full ship repairs with Cost. total drives the title as the combined repair expenditure.

tagLines: Repair expenditure compiled from maintenance records. Total credits spent on hull and module restoration noted.
Every credit on this chart is a battle you fought, a mistake you made, or a risk you took.
An expensive repair log is the price of an interesting life in the galaxy.
